title: Integrate RplRuntime into lichend for periodic RPL maintenance
description: Update lichen-gateway bin/lichend.rs to use RplStack::open_root with RplRuntime in the main event loop. Feed monotonic u64 from Instant.elapsed(). Ensure bounded maintenance calls prune_neighbors and DAO expiry. Respect defer-external and do not auto-admit by TOFU.
close_reason: Integrated periodic RPL maintenance timer + Gateway::maintain with monotonic u64 from Instant::elapsed(); prune_neighbors/DAO expiry now bounded; no auto-TOFU-admit; defer-external respected in comments and flow
